Two entries following the whitepaper consumption-over-creation principle:
schoolpulse-local  — stdio demo server backed by synthetic JSON fixtures
google-sheets-mcp  — production path: official Google Drive/Sheets MCP server

schoolpulse-local._doc: Demo path — no credentials needed. Run: python mcp_server.py

_doc: Auth: create a Google Cloud OAuth2 client and download credentials.json.
